signature.instructions:
You are an intent classifier for the BANKING77 dataset. Given a single retail-banking customer message, return the ONE most appropriate intent label.

You MUST output exactly one of the 77 snake_case labels listed below, verbatim, with no extra words or punctuation.

LABELS WITH DISAMBIGUATION HINTS (read carefully — many pairs are confusable):
- Refund_not_showing_up: user was promised/expecting a refund that hasn't arrived.
- activate_my_card: how to activate a newly received card.
- age_limit: minimum age to open/use the account.
- apple_pay_or_google_pay: linking card to Apple Pay / Google Pay.
- atm_support: which ATMs can be used / ATM availability.
- automatic_top_up: setting up auto top-up rules.
- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: transferred INTO account, balance didn't update.
- balance_not_updated_after_cheque_or_cash_deposit: deposited cash/cheque, balance didn't update.
- beneficiary_not_allowed: HOW to add/transfer to a beneficiary, or beneficiary rejected/not allowed. Use this for generic 'how do I transfer to a beneficiary/someone/a person' questions.
- cancel_transfer: cancel a transfer that was made.
- card_about_to_expire: card is expiring soon, what to do.
- card_acceptance: whether a merchant/place accepts the CARD (using existing card to pay somewhere).
- card_arrival: when will my ordered card arrive / hasn't arrived yet.
- card_delivery_estimate: estimated delivery time for a card.
- card_linking: linking an external card to the account.
- card_not_working: physical card not working at POS/ATM.
- card_payment_fee_charged: fee charged on a card PAYMENT (purchase).
- card_payment_not_recognised: unknown card payment on statement.
- card_payment_wrong_exchange_rate: card payment used wrong FX rate.
- card_swallowed: ATM ate the card.
- cash_withdrawal_charge: fee for ATM cash withdrawal.
- cash_withdrawal_not_recognised: unknown ATM withdrawal on statement.
- change_pin: change the PIN of the card.
- compromised_card: card details compromised / suspected fraud.
- contactless_not_working: contactless/tap not working.
- country_support: which countries the service supports (account availability by country).
- declined_card_payment: card payment was declined.
- declined_cash_withdrawal: ATM withdrawal declined.
- declined_transfer: transfer was declined.
- direct_debit_payment_not_recognised: unknown direct debit.
- disposable_card_limits: limits on disposable virtual cards.
- edit_personal_details: change name/address/phone/etc.
- exchange_charge: fee for currency exchange in-app.
- exchange_rate: what exchange rate is used in-app.
- exchange_via_app: how to exchange currency in the app.
- extra_charge_on_statement: unexpected extra charge appeared.
- failed_transfer: a transfer failed.
- fiat_currency_support: which fiat currencies are supported.
- get_disposable_virtual_card: how to get a disposable virtual card.
- get_physical_card: how to obtain/receive the physical card OR PIN mailer (e.g. 'I haven't received my PIN yet' = waiting on physical card/PIN mailer).
- getting_spare_card: getting an additional/spare card.
- getting_virtual_card: getting a virtual card.
- lost_or_stolen_card: card lost or stolen.
- lost_or_stolen_phone: phone lost or stolen.
- order_physical_card: ordering a new physical card.
- passcode_forgotten: forgot APP passcode/password (NOT card PIN, NOT waiting for PIN mailer).
- pending_card_payment: card payment stuck pending.
- pending_cash_withdrawal: ATM withdrawal pending.
- pending_top_up: top-up stuck pending.
- pending_transfer: transfer stuck pending.
- pin_blocked: PIN blocked after wrong attempts.
- receiving_money: how to receive money from someone.
- request_refund: user wants to request a refund.
- reverted_card_payment?: a card payment was reverted.
- supported_cards_and_currencies: which EXTERNAL cards/currencies can be used to TOP UP or fund the account (e.g. 'can I use my Amex to add money'). Contrast with card_acceptance (using our card at a merchant).
- terminate_account: close the account.
- top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge: fee for topping up via BANK TRANSFER / SEPA / incoming transfer to fund account. 'Charge for receiving a SEPA transfer' = topping up by bank transfer, so this label.
- top_up_by_card_charge: fee for topping up via card.
- top_up_by_cash_or_cheque: topping up via cash/cheque.
- top_up_failed: a top-up failed.
- top_up_limits: limits on top-ups.
- top_up_reverted: a top-up was reverted.
- topping_up_by_card: how to top up using a card.
- transaction_charged_twice: same transaction charged twice.
- transfer_fee_charged: fee charged on an OUTGOING transfer the user sent.
- transfer_into_account: how to transfer money INTO own account (funding own account).
- transfer_not_received_by_recipient: sent transfer, recipient didn't get it.
- transfer_timing: how long transfers take.
- unable_to_verify_identity: identity verification failed.
- verify_my_identity: how to verify identity.
- verify_source_of_funds: verifying source of funds.
- verify_top_up: verifying a top-up card/source.
- virtual_card_not_working: virtual card not working.
- visa_or_mastercard: choosing Visa vs Mastercard for own card.
- why_verify_identity: why identity verification is required.
- wrong_amount_of_cash_received: ATM dispensed wrong amount.
- wrong_exchange_rate_for_cash_withdrawal: wrong FX on ATM withdrawal.

CRITICAL DISAMBIGUATIONS:
1. 'Can I use my <external card brand> to add money/top up?' -> supported_cards_and_currencies (NOT card_acceptance).
2. 'Charge/fee for receiving a bank/SEPA transfer' -> top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge (incoming transfers fund/top up the account; NOT transfer_fee_charged which is for outgoing transfer fees).
3. 'I haven't received my PIN' / 'yet to receive my pin' -> get_physical_card (PIN mailer arrives with/like the physical card). 'Forgot my passcode/password' for the app -> passcode_forgotten.
4. 'How do I transfer to a beneficiary / to someone?' -> beneficiary_not_allowed (this label covers generic questions about transferring to a beneficiary). transfer_into_account is only for moving money into your OWN account.
5. card_acceptance = using OUR card at a merchant. supported_cards_and_currencies = which external cards/currencies can fund the account.
6. transfer_fee_charged = fee on outgoing transfer sent by user. top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge = fee on incoming bank transfer used to top up.

Think briefly about the customer's true GOAL, then output only the label.

module_src:
class StringSignatureModule(dspy.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # Single focused ChainOfThought classifier with rich label descriptions.
        # We use one LM call to keep cost low, but give the model detailed
        # disambiguation hints so it can distinguish confusable pairs.
        instructions = (
            "You are an intent classifier for the BANKING77 dataset. "
            "Given a single retail-banking customer message, return the ONE most appropriate intent label.\n\n"
            "You MUST output exactly one of the 77 snake_case labels listed below, verbatim, with no extra words or punctuation.\n\n"
            "LABELS WITH DISAMBIGUATION HINTS (read carefully — many pairs are confusable):\n"
            "- Refund_not_showing_up: user was promised/expecting a refund that hasn't arrived.\n"
            "- activate_my_card: how to activate a newly received card.\n"
            "- age_limit: minimum age to open/use the account.\n"
            "- apple_pay_or_google_pay: linking card to Apple Pay / Google Pay.\n"
            "- atm_support: which ATMs can be used / ATM availability.\n"
            "- automatic_top_up: setting up auto top-up rules.\n"
            "- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: transferred INTO account, balance didn't update.\n"
            "- balance_not_updated_after_cheque_or_cash_deposit: deposited cash/cheque, balance didn't update.\n"
            "- beneficiary_not_allowed: HOW to add/transfer to a beneficiary, or beneficiary rejected/not allowed. Use this for generic 'how do I transfer to a beneficiary/someone/a person' questions.\n"
            "- cancel_transfer: cancel a transfer that was made.\n"
            "- card_about_to_expire: card is expiring soon, what to do.\n"
            "- card_acceptance: whether a merchant/place accepts the CARD (using existing card to pay somewhere).\n"
            "- card_arrival: when will my ordered card arrive / hasn't arrived yet.\n"
            "- card_delivery_estimate: estimated delivery time for a card.\n"
            "- card_linking: linking an external card to the account.\n"
            "- card_not_working: physical card not working at POS/ATM.\n"
            "- card_payment_fee_charged: fee charged on a card PAYMENT (purchase).\n"
            "- card_payment_not_recognised: unknown card payment on statement.\n"
            "- card_payment_wrong_exchange_rate: card payment used wrong FX rate.\n"
            "- card_swallowed: ATM ate the card.\n"
            "- cash_withdrawal_charge: fee for ATM cash withdrawal.\n"
            "- cash_withdrawal_not_recognised: unknown ATM withdrawal on statement.\n"
            "- change_pin: change the PIN of the card.\n"
            "- compromised_card: card details compromised / suspected fraud.\n"
            "- contactless_not_working: contactless/tap not working.\n"
            "- country_support: which countries the service supports (account availability by country).\n"
            "- declined_card_payment: card payment was declined.\n"
            "- declined_cash_withdrawal: ATM withdrawal declined.\n"
            "- declined_transfer: transfer was declined.\n"
            "- direct_debit_payment_not_recognised: unknown direct debit.\n"
            "- disposable_card_limits: limits on disposable virtual cards.\n"
            "- edit_personal_details: change name/address/phone/etc.\n"
            "- exchange_charge: fee for currency exchange in-app.\n"
            "- exchange_rate: what exchange rate is used in-app.\n"
            "- exchange_via_app: how to exchange currency in the app.\n"
            "- extra_charge_on_statement: unexpected extra charge appeared.\n"
            "- failed_transfer: a transfer failed.\n"
            "- fiat_currency_support: which fiat currencies are supported.\n"
            "- get_disposable_virtual_card: how to get a disposable virtual card.\n"
            "- get_physical_card: how to obtain/receive the physical card OR PIN mailer (e.g. 'I haven't received my PIN yet' = waiting on physical card/PIN mailer).\n"
            "- getting_spare_card: getting an additional/spare card.\n"
            "- getting_virtual_card: getting a virtual card.\n"
            "- lost_or_stolen_card: card lost or stolen.\n"
            "- lost_or_stolen_phone: phone lost or stolen.\n"
            "- order_physical_card: ordering a new physical card.\n"
            "- passcode_forgotten: forgot APP passcode/password (NOT card PIN, NOT waiting for PIN mailer).\n"
            "- pending_card_payment: card payment stuck pending.\n"
            "- pending_cash_withdrawal: ATM withdrawal pending.\n"
            "- pending_top_up: top-up stuck pending.\n"
            "- pending_transfer: transfer stuck pending.\n"
            "- pin_blocked: PIN blocked after wrong attempts.\n"
            "- receiving_money: how to receive money from someone.\n"
            "- request_refund: user wants to request a refund.\n"
            "- reverted_card_payment?: a card payment was reverted.\n"
            "- supported_cards_and_currencies: which EXTERNAL cards/currencies can be used to TOP UP or fund the account (e.g. 'can I use my Amex to add money'). Contrast with card_acceptance (using our card at a merchant).\n"
            "- terminate_account: close the account.\n"
            "- top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge: fee for topping up via BANK TRANSFER / SEPA / incoming transfer to fund account. 'Charge for receiving a SEPA transfer' = topping up by bank transfer, so this label.\n"
            "- top_up_by_card_charge: fee for topping up via card.\n"
            "- top_up_by_cash_or_cheque: topping up via cash/cheque.\n"
            "- top_up_failed: a top-up failed.\n"
            "- top_up_limits: limits on top-ups.\n"
            "- top_up_reverted: a top-up was reverted.\n"
            "- topping_up_by_card: how to top up using a card.\n"
            "- transaction_charged_twice: same transaction charged twice.\n"
            "- transfer_fee_charged: fee charged on an OUTGOING transfer the user sent.\n"
            "- transfer_into_account: how to transfer money INTO own account (funding own account).\n"
            "- transfer_not_received_by_recipient: sent transfer, recipient didn't get it.\n"
            "- transfer_timing: how long transfers take.\n"
            "- unable_to_verify_identity: identity verification failed.\n"
            "- verify_my_identity: how to verify identity.\n"
            "- verify_source_of_funds: verifying source of funds.\n"
            "- verify_top_up: verifying a top-up card/source.\n"
            "- virtual_card_not_working: virtual card not working.\n"
            "- visa_or_mastercard: choosing Visa vs Mastercard for own card.\n"
            "- why_verify_identity: why identity verification is required.\n"
            "- wrong_amount_of_cash_received: ATM dispensed wrong amount.\n"
            "- wrong_exchange_rate_for_cash_withdrawal: wrong FX on ATM withdrawal.\n\n"
            "CRITICAL DISAMBIGUATIONS:\n"
            "1. 'Can I use my <external card brand> to add money/top up?' -> supported_cards_and_currencies (NOT card_acceptance).\n"
            "2. 'Charge/fee for receiving a bank/SEPA transfer' -> top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge (incoming transfers fund/top up the account; NOT transfer_fee_charged which is for outgoing transfer fees).\n"
            "3. 'I haven't received my PIN' / 'yet to receive my pin' -> get_physical_card (PIN mailer arrives with/like the physical card). 'Forgot my passcode/password' for the app -> passcode_forgotten.\n"
            "4. 'How do I transfer to a beneficiary / to someone?' -> beneficiary_not_allowed (this label covers generic questions about transferring to a beneficiary). transfer_into_account is only for moving money into your OWN account.\n"
            "5. card_acceptance = using OUR card at a merchant. supported_cards_and_currencies = which external cards/currencies can fund the account.\n"
            "6. transfer_fee_charged = fee on outgoing transfer sent by user. top_up_by_bank_transfer_charge = fee on incoming bank transfer used to top up.\n\n"
            "Think briefly about the customer's true GOAL, then output only the label."
        )
        self.classify = dspy.ChainOfThought(
            dspy.Signature("text: str -> intent: str", instructions)
        )

    def forward(self, **inputs):
        text = inputs["text"]
        result = self.classify(text=text)
        label = (result.intent or "").strip().strip(".").strip()
        # Strip any accidental surrounding quotes/backticks.
        for ch in ('"', "'", "`"):
            if label.startswith(ch) and label.endswith(ch) and len(label) >= 2:
                label = label[1:-1].strip()
        # If the model added a trailing period or extra words, take the last token-like label.
        # (Labels contain letters, digits, underscores, and one has a trailing '?').
        return dspy.Prediction(intent=label)
